title: microVM Configuration
description: Infrastructure-as-code definition for a microVM. Same schema for both Cloud Hypervisor and Firecracker VMMs.

name.description: VM identifier. Lowercase, numbers, hyphens only.

vmm.description: Virtual Machine Monitor to use. Determines binary, kernel path, and runtime behavior.

type.description: Storage backend. 'thin' = devmapper thin-provisioned block device (space-efficient). 'raw' = raw ext4 file on disk.

size_mb.description: Virtual disk size in MB. For 'thin' type, this is the virtual size (actual usage is copy-on-write).

thin_device_id.description: Device-mapper thin device ID. Auto-assigned on creation. Required for type=thin.

ip.description: Static IPv4 address for the VM.

mac.description: MAC address. Auto-generated if not specified.

bridge.description: Host bridge interface to attach TAP to.

tap_id.description: TAP interface numeric ID. Creates tap{N} on host.

source.description: 'oci' = pull and extract OCI/Docker image. 'existing' = use pre-existing rootfs.

ref.description: OCI image reference. Required when source=oci.

kernel.description: Kernel configuration. Kernel binary path is derived from vmm field at runtime.

cmdline.description: Kernel command line (without IP, which is appended at runtime from network config).

autostart.description: Start VM automatically when array starts.
